description: Initiate OAuth2 login flow via browser. Automatically attempts token refresh if credentials exist, unless --force is specified.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force new browser authentication (skip refresh check). Use when you need to re-authenticate or suspect token issues.

flow: 1. If --force is NOT specified and credentials exist: attempt token refresh first
2. If refresh succeeds: return success (no browser needed)
3. If refresh fails or --force specified: open browser for authorization
output_includes: refreshed: boolean (true if token was refreshed without browser)

errors.description: xion-toolkit CLI not found in PATH

examples.description: Login with default settings (attempts refresh first)
Force fresh login with custom port
